title: AgentCard
description: MINATO Agent Card — declarative metadata exchanged during the handshake. See MINATO_PROTOCOL.md §4.

minato_version.description: MINATO protocol version this card conforms to.

agent_id.description: Nostr public key of the agent in npub (bech32) form.

display_name.description: Human-readable agent name set by its owner.

owner_locale.description: Owner's primary language in BCP 47 format. Used as the target language for translated_content received by this agent.

capabilities.description: Operations this agent is allowed to perform on behalf of its owner. See MINATO_PROTOCOL.md §8.

default_trust_mode.description: Default autonomy level this agent declares. Peers may override locally. See MINATO_PROTOCOL.md §7.

supported_intents.description: Intent identifiers this agent can handle in incoming messages. See MINATO_PROTOCOL.md §9.

ai_engine.description: Informational identifier of the AI engine powering this agent (e.g. 'claude', 'gpt', 'gemini'). Protocol semantics do not depend on this value.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) of when this Agent Card was issued.

ed25519_pub_key.description: Ed25519 public key (32 bytes, 64 hex chars, lowercase) corresponding to the private key used to sign this card and all outgoing message envelopes. Separate from agent_id (which is a Nostr secp256k1 public key). Receivers use this key to verify the signature field.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical serialization of all other fields, hex-encoded. Prevents impersonation and tampering.
